title: alsine laricifolia subsp. kitaibelii
intro: Alsine laricifolia subsp. kitaibelii, also known as mountain sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of mountain sorrel include its ability to help with digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Mountain sorrel can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
